name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-8
title: Consolidate make-readonly.py + make-writable.py: merge into one script, move to scripts/, wrap in a skill
description: make-readonly.py and make-writable.py live at repo root and do complementary things (chmod -w / chmod +w on archive/ and test/). Issues: (1) root-level scripts are not scoped to any feature; they should live under a feature's scripts/ directory. (2) Two scripts with mirror logic should be one script with a lock/unlock subcommand. (3) The functionality should be wrapped in a skill so it can be invoked by name rather than by path. Proposed: merge into a single scripts/repo-permissions.py with 'lock' and 'unlock' subcommands, wrap in a rabbit-cage skill, remove root-level files.

history.note: Merged make-readonly.py and make-writable.py into repo-permissions.py (lock|unlock subcommands) under rabbit-cage/scripts/, wrapped in repo-permissions skill, deployed to .claude/skills/, added build-contract entry, removed root-level files.
